<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <radialGradient id="bgGrad" cx="50%" cy="40%" r="80%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#070617" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0b0f1a" />
    </radialGradient>
    <radialGradient id="marsGrad" cx="35%" cy="30%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffd6bf" />
      <stop offset="35%" stop-color="#ff7a45" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#9b2a18" />
    </radialGradient>
    <clipPath id="planetClip">
      <circle cx="300" cy="260" r="170" />
    </clipPath>
    <filter id="softGlow" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="8" result="b" />
      <feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- background -->
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="url(#bgGrad)" />

  <!-- stars -->
  <g fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.85">
    <circle cx="40" cy="60" r="1.8" opacity="0.9" />
    <circle cx="120" cy="40" r="1.2" opacity="0.7" />
    <circle cx="200" cy="90" r="2.0" opacity="0.85" />
    <circle cx="460" cy="30" r="1.4" opacity="0.6" />
    <circle cx="360" cy="120" r="1.6" opacity="0.8" />
    <circle cx="80" cy="210" r="1.1" opacity="0.6" />
    <circle cx="280" cy="30" r="1.3" opacity="0.7" />
    <circle cx="450" cy="200" r="1.6" opacity="0.75" />
    <circle cx="330" cy="420" r="1.2" opacity="0.6" />
    <circle cx="150" cy="330" r="1.4" opacity="0.7" />
  </g>

  <!-- planet (Mars) -->
  <g filter="url(#softGlow)">
    <circle cx="300" cy="260" r="170" fill="url(#marsGrad)" />
    <!-- subtle highlight -->
    <ellipse cx="235" cy="200" rx="68" ry="68" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.12" />
  </g>

  <!-- surface details clipped to planet -->
  <g clip-path="url(#planetClip)">
    <!-- darker regions / plains -->
    <path d="M210 170 C250 150, 320 160, 360 190 C340 230, 280 240, 240 230 C210 220, 200 200, 210 170 Z" fill="#7a2a1d" opacity="0.7" />
    <ellipse cx="330" cy="300" rx="90" ry="50" fill="#7b2b1f" opacity="0.55" transform="rotate(-18 330 300)" />
    <ellipse cx="260" cy="330" rx="40" ry="26" fill="#8b3a2b" opacity="0.5" />

    <!-- craters -->
    <g opacity="0.9">
      <circle cx="320" cy="240" r="22" fill="#8f3b2a" />
      <circle cx="320" cy="240" r="10" fill="#b55a44" opacity="0.12" />

      <circle cx="220" cy="300" r="28" fill="#8a3428" />
      <circle cx="220" cy="300" r="12" fill="#c46b53" opacity="0.12" />

      <circle cx="280" cy="200" r="16" fill="#8e3a2a" />
      <circle cx="280" cy="200" r="7" fill="#c76b57" opacity="0.12" />
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- two small moons -->
  <g>
    <g transform="translate(420,110)">
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="18" fill="#cfcfcf" />
      <circle cx="-6" cy="-3" r="4" fill="#b3b3b3" />
      <circle cx="5" cy="5" r="3" fill="#b7b7b7" />
    </g>

    <g transform="translate(370,70)">
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="12" ry="10" fill="#d3d3d3" />
      <circle cx="-4" cy="2" r="2.5" fill="#b9b9b9" />
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- faint planetary ring-like dust (subtle) -->
  <ellipse cx="300" cy="260" rx="220" ry="80" fill="none" stroke="#ffb8a0" stroke-opacity="0.06" stroke-width="18" />
</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#f7f7f9"/>
  <!-- left person whispering -->
  <g transform="translate(120,260)">
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="70" ry="90" fill="#e6eaea"/>
    <circle cx="-20" cy="-10" r="8" fill="#c4c6c6"/>
    <path d="M-5,15 C20,10 40,30 40,50 C10,60 -10,50 -5,15" fill="#dfe3e3"/>
    <path d="M-10,-20 C10,-30 40,-10 40,10" stroke="#bfc3c3" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M50,20 C70,5 80,15 75,35 C70,50 55,55 45,40 C35,30 40,25 50,20" fill="#e6eaea" stroke="#cfcfcf" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>

  <!-- right person listening (mirrored) -->
  <g transform="translate(360,260) scale(-1,1)">
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="70" ry="90" fill="#f0f2f3"/>
    <circle cx="-20" cy="-10" r="8" fill="#c4c6c6"/>
    <path d="M-5,15 C20,10 40,30 40,50 C10,60 -10,50 -5,15" fill="#e9ecec"/>
    <path d="M70,-5 C78,0 78,20 70,30 C66,24 66,4 70,-5" fill="#dfe3e3"/>
  </g>

  <!-- faint whispered sound lines -->
  <g stroke="#9ea3a3" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6">
    <path d="M190,230 C240,210 280,210 310,230" stroke-dasharray="6 8" opacity="0.5"/>
    <path d="M195,250 C245,235 285,235 315,250" stroke-dasharray="4 10" opacity="0.35" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <path d="M200,270 C250,260 290,260 320,270" stroke-dasharray="2 12" opacity="0.2" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>

  <ellipse cx="256" cy="320" rx="220" ry="100" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.03"/>
</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <!-- soft background -->
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#f6f8fb" />

  <!-- motion/energy zigzags near head to suggest anxious buzzing -->
  <path d="M330 70 L350 90 L330 110" fill="none" stroke="#f39c12" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.95" />
  <path d="M290 60 L305 82 L290 104" fill="none" stroke="#f39c12" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.9" />
  <path d="M370 100 L390 120 L370 140" fill="none" stroke="#f39c12" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.85" />

  <!-- nervous character body -->
  <!-- torso -->
  <path d="M180 300 C180 260 200 220 256 220 C312 220 332 260 332 300 L332 360 C332 380 312 396 256 396 C200 396 180 380 180 360 Z" fill="#9fbadf" stroke="#6e8fb0" stroke-width="6" />

  <!-- head -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="150" r="60" fill="#ffd9c0" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="6" />

  <!-- eyebrows (angled) -->
  <path d="M220 125 L235 115" stroke="#7b4b3a" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" />
  <path d="M292 115 L307 125" stroke="#7b4b3a" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" />

  <!-- eyes (white with small pupils) -->
  <circle cx="234" cy="150" r="9" fill="#fff" stroke="#5a3f34" stroke-width="3" />
  <circle cx="278" cy="150" r="9" fill="#fff" stroke="#5a3f34" stroke-width="3" />
  <circle cx="234" cy="151" r="4" fill="#2b2b2b" />
  <circle cx="278" cy="152" r="4" fill="#2b2b2b" />

  <!-- small trembling mouth (wavy) -->
  <path d="M236 182 C244 188 248 176 256 182 C264 188 268 176 276 182" fill="none" stroke="#7b4b3a" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" />

  <!-- sweat droplets near temple -->
  <path d="M210 120 C205 110 215 100 220 110 C225 120 215 128 210 120 Z" fill="#aee6ff" stroke="#6fbfe6" stroke-width="2" />
  <path d="M295 95 C290 85 300 76 305 86 C310 96 300 106 295 95 Z" fill="#aee6ff" stroke="#6fbfe6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.95" />
  <path d="M330 130 C325 120 335 112 340 122 C345 132 335 140 330 130 Z" fill="#aee6ff" stroke="#6fbfe6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.9" />

  <!-- arms and hands, drawn multiple times with slight offsets to suggest trembling -->
  <!-- base arm left -->
  <path d="M200 280 C180 260 180 240 210 220" fill="none" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="14" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" />
  <!-- offsets (shaky) left -->
  <path d="M202 282 C182 262 182 242 212 222" fill="none" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="12" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.35" />
  <path d="M198 278 C178 258 178 238 208 218" fill="none" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.35" />
  <!-- left hand (three overlapped to show quiver) -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="220" r="16" fill="#ffd9c0" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="4" />
  <circle cx="214" cy="222" r="14" fill="#ffd9c0" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.35" />
  <circle cx="206" cy="218" r="13" fill="#ffd9c0" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.25" />

  <!-- right arm base -->
  <path d="M312 280 C332 260 332 240 302 220" fill="none" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="14" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" />
  <!-- offsets (shaky) right -->
  <path d="M314 282 C334 262 334 242 304 222" fill="none" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="12" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.35" />
  <path d="M310 278 C330 258 330 238 300 218" fill="none" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.35" />
  <!-- right hand (overlapped) -->
  <circle cx="302" cy="220" r="16" fill="#ffd9c0" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="4" />
  <circle cx="298" cy="222" r="14" fill="#ffd9c0" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.35" />
  <circle cx="306" cy="218" r="13" fill="#ffd9c0" stroke="#c68b6a" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.25" />

  <!-- small jitter lines near hands to emphasize shaking -->
  <path d="M230 230 L252 246" stroke="#7b4b3a" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.7" />
  <path d="M220 238 L241 254" stroke="#7b4b3a" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6" />
  <path d="M292 230 L270 246" stroke="#7b4b3a" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.7" />
  <path d="M302 238 L281 254" stroke="#7b4b3a" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6" />

  <!-- subtle blush / tension on cheeks -->
  <ellipse cx="214" cy="162" rx="10" ry="6" fill="#ffd1c2" opacity="0.5" />
  <ellipse cx="298" cy="164" rx="10" ry="6" fill="#ffd1c2" opacity="0.5" />

  <!-- faint shadow under character -->
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="420" rx="110" ry="24" fill="#d7dbe1" opacity="0.35" />
</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bgGrad" x1="0" x2="0" y1="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0b2340" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#071427" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="cloudGrad" x1="0" x2="1" y1="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#6b6b6b" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3c3c3c" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="boltGrad" x1="0" x2="0" y1="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#fff06a" />
      <stop offset="60%" stop-color="#ffd24a" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ff9f1c" />
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="glow" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="8" result="blur" />
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in="blur" />
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic" />
      </feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- background -->
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="url(#bgGrad)" />

  <!-- distant subtle cloud shadow -->
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="300" rx="140" ry="40" fill="rgba(0,0,0,0.12)" />

  <!-- main cloud -->
  <g transform="translate(0, -20)">
    <path d="M120 300
             c-30 0 -50 -28 -40 -58
             c10 -34 46 -48 80 -36
             c6 -40 48 -68 92 -56
             c10 -30 56 -46 92 -18
             c34 -8 80 10 92 46
             c18 44 -6 86 -52 92
             H120z"
          fill="url(#cloudGrad)" />
    <!-- soft top bumps to make cloud rounder -->
    <circle cx="160" cy="230" r="28" fill="url(#cloudGrad)" />
    <circle cx="220" cy="200" r="36" fill="url(#cloudGrad)" />
    <circle cx="310" cy="190" r="48" fill="url(#cloudGrad)" />
    <circle cx="380" cy="220" r="34" fill="url(#cloudGrad)" />
  </g>

  <!-- lightning bolt with glow -->
  <g filter="url(#glow)">
    <path d="M320 270
             L260 360
             L300 360
             L240 460
             L360 340
             L320 340
             L360 270
             Z"
          fill="url(#boltGrad)" stroke="#d37a00" stroke-width="3" stroke-linejoin="round" />
  </g>

  <!-- small spark lines near bolt tip -->
  <g opacity="0.85" stroke="#ffd96b" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round">
    <path d="M352 264 L372 248" />
    <path d="M344 280 L368 292" />
  </g>

</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>

  <path d="M0 300 C120 260 220 280 320 260 C420 240 520 290 512 360 L512 512 L0 512 Z" fill="#6EA02E" opacity="0.9" />

    <ellipse cx="-8" cy="0" rx="18" ry="12" fill="none" stroke="#C28B38" stroke-width="3" />

  <!-- Foreground wheat stalks -->

    <path d="M110 420 C110 380 120 360 130 340" />
    <g fill="#F2C15A" stroke="#B8862B" stroke-width="1">

    <g fill="#F2C15A" stroke="#B8862B" stroke-width="1">
      <ellipse cx="174" cy="354" rx="7" ry="10" transform="rotate(18 174 354)" />
      <ellipse cx="166" cy="366" rx="7" ry="10" transform="rotate(8 166 366)" />
      <ellipse cx="158" cy="378" rx="7" ry="10" transform="rotate(-6 158 378)" />

    <!-- stalk 3 -->

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#f7f1e1" />

  <!-- shadow under cup -->
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="410" rx="120" ry="18" fill="#000" opacity="0.08" />

  <!-- saucer -->
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="380" rx="150" ry="28" fill="#efefef" stroke="#e0e0e0" stroke-width="2" />

  <!-- cup body -->
  <rect x="156" y="300" width="200" height="120" rx="20" ry="20" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d0d0d0" stroke-width="4" />

  <!-- cup rim outline -->
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="320" rx="102" ry="40" fill="none" stroke="#d0d0d0" stroke-width="4" />

  <!-- coffee surface -->
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="320" rx="82" ry="34" fill="#3b2b22" />

  <!-- handle (outer) -->
  <path d="M356 330 a40 40 0 1 0 0 80" stroke="#d0d0d0" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" />
  <!-- handle (inner white) -->
  <path d="M356 335 a30 30 0 1 0 0 70" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="10" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" />

  <!-- steam -->
  <path d="M220 250 C216 230, 228 210, 234 190" stroke="#bdbdbd" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" />
  <path d="M256 245 C252 225, 266 205, 270 185" stroke="#bdbdbd" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" />
  <path d="M292 248 C288 228, 304 208, 308 188" stroke="#bdbdbd" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" />

  <!-- small drop and ripple on coffee to suggest strong flavor -->
  <circle cx="220" cy="322" r="6" fill="#2f1f18" opacity="0.9" />
  <ellipse cx="220" cy="330" rx="18" ry="6" fill="#000" opacity="0.04" />

  <!-- face showing dislike (grimace) -->
  <g transform="translate(360,160)">
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="36" fill="#ffd9b3" stroke="#e0b88a" stroke-width="3" />
    <!-- eyes: squinting -->
    <path d="M-16 -6 q8 -10 16 0" stroke="#2b2b2b" stroke-width="4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <path d="M-8 -6 q8 -10 16 0" transform="translate(-4,0)" stroke="#2b2b2b" stroke-width="4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <!-- frowning mouth -->
    <path d="M-18 12 q18 18 36 0" stroke="#2b2b2b" stroke-width="4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <!-- small wrinkle lines between eyes for displeasure -->
    <path d="M-6 -14 q6 6 12 0" stroke="#e09973" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" />
  </g>

  <!-- subtle bitter indicator: a tiny jagged line near cup to suggest strong taste -->
  <path d="M300 340 l8 -6 l-6 -6 l10 -4" stroke="#6b3f2e" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.9" />
</svg>

<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='512' height='512' viewBox='0 0 512 512'>
  <defs>
    <radialGradient id='bgGrad' cx='50%' cy='30%' r='70%'>
      <stop offset='0%' stop-color='#f7fbf7'/>
      <stop offset='100%' stop-color='#e9f2ee'/>
    </radialGradient>
    <linearGradient id='billGrad' x1='0' x2='1' y1='0' y2='1'>
      <stop offset='0' stop-color='#49b36a'/>
      <stop offset='1' stop-color='#2f8a4a'/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id='billEdge' x1='0' x2='1'>
      <stop offset='0' stop-color='rgba(0,0,0,0.12)'/>
      <stop offset='1' stop-color='rgba(255,255,255,0.06)'/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id='coinGrad' x1='0' x2='1'>
      <stop offset='0' stop-color='#ffd86b'/>
      <stop offset='1' stop-color='#f5b400'/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id='softShadow' x='-50%' y='-50%' width='200%' height='200%'>
      <feDropShadow dx='0' dy='6' stdDeviation='8' flood-color='#000' flood-opacity='0.18'/>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <rect width='100%' height='100%' fill='url(#bgGrad)' />

  <!-- Back bill -->
  <g transform='translate(66,160) rotate(-8)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='380' height='200' rx='20' fill='url(#billGrad)' stroke='#1f6b3f' stroke-width='6' filter='url(#softShadow)'/>
    <rect x='18' y='18' width='344' height='164' rx='14' fill='none' stroke='url(#billEdge)' stroke-width='4' opacity='0.7'/>
    <ellipse cx='190' cy='100' rx='54' ry='40' fill='#c9f1d2' opacity='0.9'/>
    <circle cx='190' cy='100' r='6' fill='#8bd38e' opacity='0.95'/>
  </g>

  <!-- Middle bill -->
  <g transform='translate(86,140) rotate(6)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='380' height='200' rx='20' fill='url(#billGrad)' stroke='#1f6b3f' stroke-width='6' />
    <rect x='18' y='18' width='344' height='164' rx='14' fill='none' stroke='url(#billEdge)' stroke-width='4' opacity='0.8'/>
    <ellipse cx='190' cy='100' rx='54' ry='40' fill='#c9f1d2' opacity='0.95'/>
    <circle cx='190' cy='100' r='6' fill='#8bd38e' opacity='0.95'/>
  </g>

  <!-- Top bill -->
  <g transform='translate(106,120) rotate(-2)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='380' height='200' rx='20' fill='url(#billGrad)' stroke='#1f6b3f' stroke-width='6' />
    <rect x='18' y='18' width='344' height='164' rx='14' fill='none' stroke='url(#billEdge)' stroke-width='4' opacity='0.95'/>
    <ellipse cx='190' cy='100' rx='54' ry='40' fill='#d6f7dd' opacity='1'/>
    <circle cx='190' cy='100' r='6' fill='#7fd07f' opacity='1'/>
  </g>

  <!-- Coins -->
  <g transform='translate(330,220)'>
    <g transform='translate(0,0)'>
      <ellipse cx='0' cy='62' rx='56' ry='16' fill='rgba(0,0,0,0.12)' opacity='0.6' />
      <circle cx='0' cy='0' r='46' fill='url(#coinGrad)' stroke='#b37f00' stroke-width='4' filter='url(#softShadow)' />
      <circle cx='-16' cy='-10' r='10' fill='rgba(255,255,255,0.75)' opacity='0.9'/>

    <g transform='translate(-58,34) rotate(12)'>
      <ellipse cx='0' cy='62' rx='42' ry='12' fill='rgba(0,0,0,0.08)' opacity='0.45' />

      <circle cx='-8' cy='-4' r='6' fill='rgba(255,255,255,0.75)' />

  <!-- Small accents: little sparkles to imply value -->

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="sky" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#fff0f2"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#ffffff"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="sunGrad" cx="50%" cy="40%" r="50%">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#ff5a5a"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#d90012"/>
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="url(#sky)"/>
  <circle cx="360" cy="120" r="68" fill="url(#sunGrad)"/>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <radialGradient id="bg" cx="50%" cy="45%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ff4db8" />
      <stop offset="45%" stop-color="#6b3bff" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#07103a" />
    </radialGradient>
    <filter id="soft" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="10" result="b" />
      <feBlend in="SourceGraphic" in2="b" mode="screen" />
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="url(#bg)" />

  <!-- Starburst rays (vivid rainbow) -->
  <g transform="translate(0,0)">
    <g transform="translate(0,0)">
      <path d="M256 256 L512 220 L512 292 Z" fill="#ff3b30" opacity="0.96" transform="rotate(0 256 256)" />
      <path d="M256 256 L512 220 L512 292 Z" fill="#ff9500" opacity="0.94" transform="rotate(45 256 256)" />
      <path d="M256 256 L512 220 L512 292 Z" fill="#ffd300" opacity="0.92" transform="rotate(90 256 256)" />
      <path d="M256 256 L512 220 L512 292 Z" fill="#4cd964" opacity="0.92" transform="rotate(135 256 256)" />
      <path d="M256 256 L512 220 L512 292 Z" fill="#5ac8fa" opacity="0.92" transform="rotate(180 256 256)" />
      <path d="M256 256 L512 220 L512 292 Z" fill="#007aff" opacity="0.94" transform="rotate(225 256 256)" />
      <path d="M256 256 L512 220 L512 292 Z" fill="#5856d6" opacity="0.95" transform="rotate(270 256 256)" />
      <path d="M256 256 L512 220 L512 292 Z" fill="#ff2d95" opacity="0.96" transform="rotate(315 256 256)" />
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- Overlapping vivid color blobs at center -->
  <g filter="url(#soft)">
    <circle cx="256" cy="220" r="92" fill="#ff2d95" opacity="0.85" />
    <circle cx="300" cy="270" r="74" fill="#ffd300" opacity="0.78" />
    <circle cx="212" cy="270" r="74" fill="#5ac8fa" opacity="0.78" />
    <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="56" fill="#4cd964" opacity="0.9" />
  </g>

  <!-- Bright glossy core -->
  <radialGradient id="core" cx="50%" cy="40%" r="60%">
    <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0.9" />
    <stop offset="40%" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0.2" />
    <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0" />
  </radialGradient>
  <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="34" fill="url(#core)" />

  <!-- Sparkles -->

    <circle cx="160" cy="160" r="6" />
    <circle cx="360" cy="140" r="5" />
    <circle cx="420" cy="220" r="4" />
    <circle cx="120" cy="300" r="5" />
    <circle cx="380" cy="340" r="6" />
    <circle cx="260" cy="100" r="4" />

    <rect x="-60" y="160" width="640" height="18" fill="#ffd300" transform="rotate(-18 256 256)" opacity="0.18" />
    <rect x="-60" y="200" width="640" height="18" fill="#5ac8fa" transform="rotate(-18 256 256)" opacity="0.16" />
  </g>

</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">

  <rect x="0" y="0" width="512" height="512" fill="#d0eaff" />

  <circle cx="460" cy="60" r="36" fill="#ffd66b" opacity="0.9" />

  <!-- Ground -->
  <rect x="0" y="380" width="512" height="132" fill="#e6e6e6" />

  <rect x="0" y="376" width="512" height="8" fill="#d0d0d0" />

  <!-- Crane tower -->
  <rect x="60" y="100" width="40" height="280" fill="#ffcc33" stroke="#cc9900" stroke-width="4" rx="2" />
  <!-- Tower base triangle -->
  <polygon points="50,380 110,380 80,330" fill="#ffcc33" stroke="#cc9900" stroke-width="4" />
  <!-- Tower rungs -->
  <g stroke="#cc9900" stroke-width="3">
    <line x1="66" y1="140" x2="94" y2="140" />
    <line x1="66" y1="170" x2="94" y2="170" />
    <line x1="66" y1="200" x2="94" y2="200" />

    <line x1="66" y1="260" x2="94" y2="260" />

  <!-- Beam being lifted -->

  <line x1="340" y1="266" x2="340" y2="274" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" />

  <!-- Partially built brick wall (right) -->
  <g>
    <!-- bricks color and strokes -->
    <!-- 4 rows, 4 columns, alternate offset -->
    <!-- Row 0 -->
    <rect x="340" y="268" width="40" height="28" fill="#c14a3a" stroke="#8b2b1f" stroke-width="2" />
    <rect x="380" y="268" width="40" height="28" fill="#c14a3a" stroke="#8b2b1f" stroke-width="2" />
    <rect x="420" y="268" width="40" height="28" fill="#c14a3a" stroke="#8b2b1f" stroke-width="2" />
    <rect x="460" y="268" width="40" height="28" fill="#c14a3a" stroke="#8b2b1f" stroke-width="2" />
    <!-- Row 1 (no offset) -->
    <rect x="320" y="296" width="40" height="28" fill="#c14a3a" stroke="#8b2b1f" stroke-width="2" />
    <rect x="360" y="296" width="40" height="28" fill="#c14a3a" stroke="#8b2b1f" stroke-width="2" />
    <rect x="400" y="296" width="40" height="28" fill="#c14a3a" stroke="#8b2b1f" stroke-width="2" />
    <rect x="440" y="296" width="40" height="28" fill="#c14a3a" stroke="#8b2b1f" stroke-width="2" />
    <!-- Row 2 (offset) -->
    <rect x="340" y="324" width="40" height="28" fill="#c14a3a" stroke="#8b2b1f" stroke-width="2" />
    <rect x="380" y="324" width="40" height="28" fill="#c14a3a" stroke="#8b2b1f" stroke-width="2" />
    <rect x="420" y="324" width="40" height="28" fill="#c14a3a" stroke="#8b2b1f" stroke-width="2" />
    <rect x="460" y="324" width="40" height="28" fill="#c14a3a" stroke="#8b2b1f" stroke-width="2" />
    <!-- Row 3 (no offset) -->
    <rect x="320" y="352" width="40" height="28" fill="#c14a3a" stroke="#8b2b1f" stroke-width="2" />
    <rect x="360" y="352" width="40" height="28" fill="#c14a3a" stroke="#8b2b1f" stroke-width="2" />
    <rect x="400" y="352" width="40" height="28" fill="#c14a3a" stroke="#8b2b1f" stroke-width="2" />
    <rect x="440" y="352" width="40" height="28" fill="#c14a3a" stroke="#8b2b1f" stroke-width="2" />
  </g>

  <!-- Small stack of spare bricks (left) -->
  <g>
    <rect x="140" y="360" width="40" height="24" fill="#c14a3a" stroke="#8b2b1f" stroke-width="2" />
    <rect x="140" y="332" width="40" height="24" fill="#c14a3a" stroke="#8b2b1f" stroke-width="2" />
    <rect x="140" y="304" width="40" height="24" fill="#c14a3a" stroke="#8b2b1f" stroke-width="2" />
  </g>

  <!-- Small tool (hammer silhouette) near spare bricks -->

    <rect x="-8" y="-10" width="20" height="14" rx="2" fill="#333" />

  <!-- Subtle shadows -->
  <ellipse cx="340" cy="299" rx="90" ry="12" fill="#000" opacity="0.06" />
  <ellipse cx="380" cy="420" rx="120" ry="18" fill="#000" opacity="0.04" />

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>

      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#9ccf9a" />

    <radialGradient id="fur" cx="50%" cy="30%" r="80%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#3a3a3a" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#111" />
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>

  <!-- background -->
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="url(#bg)" />
  <!-- ground shadow -->

  <!-- right arm (viewer left) -->

    <ellipse cx="316" cy="420" rx="60" ry="44" fill="#2a2a2a" />

    <ellipse cx="302" cy="412" rx="14" ry="9" fill="#474747" />
    <ellipse cx="322" cy="412" rx="14" ry="9" fill="#474747" />

    <path d="M180 150 C 200 120, 300 120, 332 150 C 320 140, 280 132, 256 132 C 232 132, 192 140, 180 150 Z" fill="#0f0f0f" />

<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='512' height='512' viewBox='0 0 512 512'>
  <defs>
    <radialGradient id='bg' cx='50%' cy='35%'>
      <stop offset='0%' stop-color='#0b2340'/>
      <stop offset='60%' stop-color='#071426'/>
      <stop offset='100%' stop-color='#000000'/>
    </radialGradient>
    <radialGradient id='planet' cx='35%' cy='35%'>
      <stop offset='0%' stop-color='#ffdca8'/>
      <stop offset='50%' stop-color='#e0b37a'/>
      <stop offset='100%' stop-color='#a56f3e'/>
    </radialGradient>
    <linearGradient id='ring' x1='0%' y1='0%' x2='100%' y2='0%'>
      <stop offset='0%' stop-color='#b78a4d'/>
      <stop offset='50%' stop-color='#d6b07a'/>
      <stop offset='100%' stop-color='#8f6231'/>
    </linearGradient>
    <clipPath id='planetClip'>
      <circle cx='256' cy='256' r='110'/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- background -->
  <rect width='100%' height='100%' fill='url(#bg)'/>

  <!-- ring (behind the planet) -->
  <g transform='rotate(-22 256 256)'>
    <ellipse cx='256' cy='256' rx='230' ry='90' fill='none' stroke='url(#ring)' stroke-width='56' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round' opacity='0.85'/>
  </g>

  <!-- planet body -->
  <circle cx='256' cy='256' r='110' fill='url(#planet)'/>

  <!-- subtle banding on the planet (clipped) -->
  <g clip-path='url(#planetClip)' opacity='0.6' transform='rotate(-10 256 256)'>
    <ellipse cx='256' cy='256' rx='140' ry='40' fill='#000' opacity='0.05'/>
    <ellipse cx='256' cy='242' rx='140' ry='28' fill='#000' opacity='0.04'/>
    <ellipse cx='256' cy='270' rx='120' ry='20' fill='#000' opacity='0.03'/>
  </g>

  <!-- front portion of the ring to cross in front of the planet -->
  <g transform='rotate(-22 256 256)'>
    <ellipse cx='256' cy='256' rx='230' ry='90' fill='none' stroke='#f5e6c8' stroke-width='16' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round' opacity='0.95'/>
  </g>

  <!-- soft shadow on lower side of ring for depth -->
  <g transform='rotate(-22 256 256)' opacity='0.35'>
    <ellipse cx='256' cy='304' rx='230' ry='90' fill='none' stroke='#000000' stroke-width='30' />
  </g>
</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#f7f5eb" />
  <defs>
    <radialGradient id="greenGrad" cx="40%" cy="40%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#cff88a" />
      <stop offset="65%" stop-color="#7cc24a" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#4f8a2d" />
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>

  <!-- whole kiwi (behind) -->
  <ellipse cx="150" cy="160" rx="110" ry="70" fill="#7b5a37" stroke="#5a3f2a" stroke-width="6" />
  <!-- fuzz around whole kiwi -->
  <g stroke="#5a3f2a" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.9" fill="none">
    <line x1="60" y1="155" x2="75" y2="135" />
    <line x1="74" y1="120" x2="90" y2="105" />
    <line x1="110" y1="95" x2="140" y2="90" />
    <line x1="170" y1="92" x2="200" y2="100" />
    <line x1="220" y1="115" x2="235" y2="135" />
    <line x1="240" y1="160" x2="235" y2="190" />
    <line x1="220" y1="205" x2="200" y2="220" />
    <line x1="170" y1="230" x2="140" y2="235" />

    <line x1="75" y1="205" x2="60" y2="185" />
    <line x1="55" y1="170" x2="60" y2="155" />
  </g>

  <!-- sliced kiwi (foreground left) -->
  <g transform="translate(120,320)">

    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="120" ry="70" fill="#7b5a37" stroke="#5a3f2a" stroke-width="6" />

    <ellipse cx="-6" cy="2" rx="86" ry="50" fill="url(#greenGrad)" />
    <!-- white core -->
    <circle cx="-6" cy="2" r="14" fill="#eefae6" />
    <!-- seeds arranged radially -->
    <ellipse cx="36" cy="2" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(90 36 2)" />
    <ellipse cx="30.4" cy="23" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(120 30.4 23)" />
    <ellipse cx="15" cy="38.4" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(150 15 38.4)" />
    <ellipse cx="-6" cy="44" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(180 -6 44)" />
    <ellipse cx="-27" cy="38.4" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(210 -27 38.4)" />
    <ellipse cx="-42.4" cy="23" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(240 -42.4 23)" />
    <ellipse cx="-48" cy="2" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(270 -48 2)" />
    <ellipse cx="-42.4" cy="-19" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(300 -42.4 -19)" />
    <ellipse cx="-27" cy="-34.4" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(330 -27 -34.4)" />
    <ellipse cx="-6" cy="-40" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(0 -6 -40)" />
    <ellipse cx="15" cy="-34.4" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(30 15 -34.4)" />
    <ellipse cx="30.4" cy="-19" rx="6" ry="3" fill="#0b0b0b" transform="rotate(60 30.4 -19)" />
  </g>

  <!-- kiwi bird (right) -->
  <g transform="translate(360,320)">
    <!-- body -->
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="95" ry="55" fill="#6b4530" stroke="#543422" stroke-width="4" />
    <!-- head -->
    <circle cx="-70" cy="-18" r="26" fill="#6b4530" stroke="#543422" stroke-width="4" />
    <!-- beak (long, pointing left) -->
    <polygon points="-44,-20 -170,-28 -170,-6 -44,-2" fill="#5a3f2a" />
    <!-- small eye -->
    <circle cx="-76" cy="-22" r="4" fill="#0b0b0b" />
    <!-- legs -->
    <line x1="10" y1="30" x2="10" y2="68" stroke="#543422" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <line x1="34" y1="30" x2="34" y2="74" stroke="#543422" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <!-- feet -->
    <line x1="10" y1="68" x2="0" y2="76" stroke="#543422" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <line x1="10" y1="68" x2="20" y2="76" stroke="#543422" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <line x1="34" y1="74" x2="24" y2="82" stroke="#543422" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <line x1="34" y1="74" x2="44" y2="82" stroke="#543422" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <!-- subtle belly highlight -->
    <ellipse cx="10" cy="6" rx="48" ry="28" fill="#7c523b" opacity="0.25" />
  </g>
</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="skinGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#80b653" />
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#d8c84a" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#f6b24a" />
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="fleshGrad" cx="40%" cy="40%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffefc6" />
      <stop offset="30%" stop-color="#ffb05c" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ff8a3b" />
    </radialGradient>
    <clipPath id="leftHalfClip">
      <!-- clip to create a flat cut on the right side of the left papaya -->
      <rect x="24" y="80" width="210" height="350" />
    </clipPath>
    <filter id="soft" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="1" />
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- left: sliced papaya half -->
  <g clip-path="url(#leftHalfClip)">
    <!-- outer skin -->
    <ellipse cx="170" cy="300" rx="140" ry="200" fill="url(#skinGrad)" stroke="#4a7a2b" stroke-width="6" />
    <!-- inner flesh (shifted to the right to suggest cavity) -->
    <ellipse cx="200" cy="300" rx="95" ry="160" fill="url(#fleshGrad)" stroke="#e48a3a" stroke-width="4" />
    <!-- inner rim (thin darker edge) -->
    <ellipse cx="200" cy="300" rx="100" ry="170" fill="none" stroke="#c96e2d" stroke-width="6" opacity="0.6" />

    <!-- seeds cluster -->
    <g fill="#151515" stroke="#0b0b0b" stroke-width="1">
      <ellipse cx="170" cy="265" rx="9" ry="12" transform="rotate(-15 170 265)" />
      <ellipse cx="186" cy="280" rx="8" ry="11" transform="rotate(-10 186 280)" />
      <ellipse cx="153" cy="290" rx="7" ry="10" transform="rotate(-20 153 290)" />
      <ellipse cx="180" cy="305" rx="9" ry="13" transform="rotate(8 180 305)" />
      <ellipse cx="165" cy="320" rx="8" ry="11" transform="rotate(-8 165 320)" />
      <ellipse cx="190" cy="335" rx="7" ry="10" transform="rotate(12 190 335)" />
      <ellipse cx="150" cy="310" rx="6" ry="9" transform="rotate(-25 150 310)" />
      <ellipse cx="205" cy="295" rx="7" ry="10" transform="rotate(18 205 295)" />
      <ellipse cx="175" cy="345" rx="6" ry="8" transform="rotate(6 175 345)" />
    </g>

    <!-- small highlights on seeds -->
    <g fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.9">
      <circle cx="168" cy="259" r="2" />
      <circle cx="183" cy="275" r="1.6" />
      <circle cx="179" cy="299" r="1.8" />
      <circle cx="193" cy="333" r="1.2" />
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- right: whole papaya -->
  <g>
    <ellipse cx="380" cy="210" rx="110" ry="160" fill="url(#skinGrad)" stroke="#41702c" stroke-width="6" />
    <!-- subtle highlight -->
    <ellipse cx="360" cy="170" rx="40" ry="70" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)" filter="url(#soft)" />
    <!-- small stem and leaf -->
    <path d="M330 120 C320 110, 300 120, 300 135 C305 128, 320 125, 330 130" fill="#5b8332" stroke="#3f5f22" stroke-width="3" />
    <path d="M345 115 C360 100, 380 100, 392 112 C380 108, 366 112, 345 115" fill="#6ea93a" stroke="#3f5f22" stroke-width="2" />
  </g>

  <!-- small ground shadow to anchor fruits -->
  <ellipse cx="220" cy="480" rx="140" ry="18" fill="rgba(0,0,0,0.12)" />
  <ellipse cx="380" cy="410" rx="100" ry="14" fill="rgba(0,0,0,0.10)" />
</svg>

    <rect x="388" y="244" width="16" height="96" rx="2" fill="#f6efe1" stroke="#c8b8a0" stroke-width="2" />

    <!-- capitals -->
    <rect x="104" y="232" width="24" height="12" rx="2" fill="#e9d3b3" stroke="#b99b7a" stroke-width="2" />
    <rect x="144" y="232" width="24" height="12" rx="2" fill="#e9d3b3" stroke="#b99b7a" stroke-width="2" />
    <rect x="184" y="232" width="24" height="12" rx="2" fill="#e9d3b3" stroke="#b99b7a" stroke-width="2" />
    <rect x="224" y="232" width="24" height="12" rx="2" fill="#e9d3b3" stroke="#b99b7a" stroke-width="2" />
    <rect x="264" y="232" width="24" height="12" rx="2" fill="#e9d3b3" stroke="#b99b7a" stroke-width="2" />
    <rect x="304" y="232" width="24" height="12" rx="2" fill="#e9d3b3" stroke="#b99b7a" stroke-width="2" />
    <rect x="344" y="232" width="24" height="12" rx="2" fill="#e9d3b3" stroke="#b99b7a" stroke-width="2" />
    <rect x="384" y="232" width="24" height="12" rx="2" fill="#e9d3b3" stroke="#b99b7a" stroke-width="2" />
  </g>

  <!-- base plinth under columns -->
  <rect x="96" y="340" width="320" height="20" fill="#d9cbb2" stroke="#b89f82" stroke-width="2" />

  <!-- central doorway (arched) -->

  <!-- steps below -->

  <!-- subtle dome highlight -->

<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='512' height='512' viewBox='0 0 512 512'>
  <rect width='512' height='512' fill='#f7f1e1' />
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id='wood1' x1='0' x2='1' y1='0' y2='1'>
      <stop offset='0' stop-color='#d6a56a' />
      <stop offset='1' stop-color='#9b6b3a' />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id='wood2' x1='0' x2='1' y1='0' y2='1'>
      <stop offset='0' stop-color='#f0cfa3' />
      <stop offset='1' stop-color='#d39a5a' />

    <filter id='shadow' x='-50%' y='-50%' width='200%' height='200%'>
      <feDropShadow dx='0' dy='6' stdDeviation='8' flood-color='#000' flood-opacity='0.15'/>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- guitar body (two overlapping ellipses for shape) -->
  <g filter='url(#shadow)'>
    <ellipse cx='300' cy='320' rx='140' ry='160' fill='url(#wood1)' stroke='#6b3f20' stroke-width='6' />
    <ellipse cx='300' cy='220' rx='90' ry='70' fill='url(#wood2)' stroke='#6b3f20' stroke-width='5' />
  </g>

  <!-- sound hole -->
  <circle cx='300' cy='300' r='40' fill='#111' opacity='0.18' />
  <circle cx='300' cy='300' r='44' fill='none' stroke='#3b2312' stroke-width='6' opacity='0.6' />

  <!-- bridge -->

  <!-- neck (polygon) -->

  <!-- headstock -->
  <polygon points='418,70 486,44 498,68 428,94' fill='#8b5a36' stroke='#5a3218' stroke-width='4' />

  <!-- tuning pegs (small circles) -->

    <circle cx='440' cy='62' r='6' fill='#f5f5f5' stroke='#6b6b6b' stroke-width='2' />
    <circle cx='456' cy='70' r='6' fill='#f5f5f5' stroke='#6b6b6b' stroke-width='2' />
    <circle cx='472' cy='60' r='6' fill='#f5f5f5' stroke='#6b6b6b' stroke-width='2' />
  </g>

  <!-- strings from bridge to headstock -->
  <g stroke='#cccccc' stroke-linecap='round'>
    <line x1='268' y1='392' x2='442' y2='66' stroke-width='1.6' />
    <line x1='282' y1='390' x2='454' y2='70' stroke-width='1.4' />
    <line x1='296' y1='388' x2='466' y2='64' stroke-width='1.2' />
    <line x1='308' y1='388' x2='478' y2='70' stroke-width='1.2' />
    <line x1='324' y1='390' x2='490' y2='66' stroke-width='1.0' />
    <line x1='338' y1='392' x2='502' y2='72' stroke-width='0.9' />
  </g>

  <!-- frets (rotated group across neck) -->
  <g transform='rotate(-18 240 160)' stroke='#3d2a20' stroke-width='3'>
    <rect x='160' y='120' width='2.5' height='260' fill='#eee' />
    <rect x='200' y='120' width='2.5' height='260' fill='#eee' />
    <rect x='240' y='120' width='2.5' height='260' fill='#eee' />
    <rect x='280' y='120' width='2.5' height='260' fill='#eee' />

</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <!-- Background sky -->
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="sky" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#77c9ff" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#2b9cff" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="metal" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#cfd6db" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#9aa6ad" />

    <filter id="softShadow" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="6" stdDeviation="8" flood-color="#000" flood-opacity="0.25" />
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="url(#sky)" />

    <rect x="-40" y="220" width="220" height="12" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.25" rx="6" transform="rotate(-6 70 226)" />

    <rect x="-40" y="200" width="260" height="8" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.12" rx="4" transform="rotate(-6 90 204)" />

    <ellipse cx="0" cy="52" rx="90" ry="18" fill="#000" opacity="0.14" filter="url(#softShadow)" />

    <!-- right wing -->
    <path d="M160,20 L40,6 L10,34 L80,60 Z" fill="url(#metal)" stroke="#6f7b7f" stroke-width="2" />

    <!-- fuselage -->

    <!-- nose cone -->

    <!-- cockpit canopy -->
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="-8" rx="28" ry="14" fill="#234a6b" opacity="0.95" stroke="#173746" stroke-width="2" />

    <!-- vertical tails -->
    <path d="M-52,10 L-70,-36 L-40,-34 Z" fill="#a9b4b8" stroke="#6f7b7f" stroke-width="2" />
    <path d="M52,10 L70,-36 L40,-34 Z" fill="#a9b4b8" stroke="#6f7b7f" stroke-width="2" />

    <!-- small fins near engines -->
    <path d="M-30,44 L-10,30 L-2,36 L-22,56 Z" fill="#9aa6ad" stroke="#6f7b7f" stroke-width="1.5" />
    <path d="M30,44 L10,30 L2,36 L22,56 Z" fill="#9aa6ad" stroke="#6f7b7f" stroke-width="1.5" />

    <!-- engine nozzles -->
    <ellipse cx="-68" cy="84" rx="14" ry="8" fill="#4b4f52" />
    <ellipse cx="68" cy="84" rx="14" ry="8" fill="#4b4f52" />

    <!-- subtle panel lines -->
    <path d="M-80,10 L-40,0" stroke="#8a9498" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/>
    <path d="M80,10 L40,0" stroke="#8a9498" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/>

    <!-- speed streak at nose -->
    <path d="M170,0 L220,-6 L220,6 Z" fill="#ffd680" opacity="0.12" />
  </g>

</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="skyGrad" x1="0" x2="0" y1="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#a6ddff"/>
      <stop offset="60%" stop-color="#7fc8ff"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#6fb8e6"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="mountainGrad" x1="0" x2="0" y1="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#6a7bd8"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#4156a3"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="waterTop" x1="0" x2="0" y1="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#7fc8ff" stop-opacity="0.15"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0f5c8a" stop-opacity="0.25"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="softBlur" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2" />
    </filter>
    <clipPath id="lowerClip">
      <rect x="0" y="320" width="512" height="192"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background sky -->
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="url(#skyGrad)" />

  <!-- Distant sun -->
  <circle cx="380" cy="80" r="40" fill="#FFD76B" />

  <!-- Mountains and foreground shapes (above water) -->
  <g id="scene">
    <polygon points="20,300 140,120 260,220 360,100 492,300" fill="url(#mountainGrad)" stroke="#2d3d83" stroke-opacity="0.2" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- smaller hill left -->
    <ellipse cx="100" cy="300" rx="100" ry="28" fill="#4a6fb3" opacity="0.9" />
    <!-- trees -->
    <g transform="translate(70,230)">
      <rect x="18" y="60" width="8" height="20" fill="#5a3a24" />
      <polygon points="0,80 44,80 22,40" fill="#114d2e" />
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(320,240)">
      <rect x="18" y="60" width="8" height="20" fill="#5a3a24" />
      <polygon points="0,80 44,80 22,40" fill="#0f5c2f" />
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- Water surface (a subtle horizontal seam) -->
  <rect x="0" y="318" width="512" height="6" fill="#eaf6ff" opacity="0.35" />

  <!-- Water plane (lower area) -->
  <rect x="0" y="320" width="512" height="192" fill="url(#waterTop)" />

  <!-- Reflected scene (inverted, blurred and faded) -->
  <g transform="translate(0,640) scale(1,-1)" opacity="0.45" filter="url(#softBlur)" clip-path="url(#lowerClip)">
    <!-- mirrored sun -->
    <circle cx="380" cy="80" r="40" fill="#FFD76B" />
    <!-- mirrored mountains -->
    <polygon points="20,300 140,120 260,220 360,100 492,300" fill="url(#mountainGrad)" stroke="#2d3d83" stroke-opacity="0.15" stroke-width="2"/>
    <ellipse cx="100" cy="300" rx="100" ry="28" fill="#4a6fb3" opacity="0.85" />
    <!-- mirrored trees -->
    <g transform="translate(70,230)">
      <rect x="18" y="60" width="8" height="20" fill="#5a3a24" />
      <polygon points="0,80 44,80 22,40" fill="#114d2e" />
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(320,240)">
      <rect x="18" y="60" width="8" height="20" fill="#5a3a24" />
      <polygon points="0,80 44,80 22,40" fill="#0f5c2f" />
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- Gentle ripples on the water to indicate reflection -->
  <g clip-path="url(#lowerClip)" opacity="0.22">
    <path d="M0 340 C80 338 160 346 240 344 C320 342 400 350 512 348" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none" opacity="0.6" />
    <path d="M0 364 C90 362 150 370 230 368 C310 366 390 374 512 372" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none" opacity="0.45" />
    <path d="M0 392 C70 390 170 398 240 396 C310 394 410 402 512 400" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none" opacity="0.35" />
    <path d="M0 424 C80 422 160 430 240 428 C320 426 400 434 512 432" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none" opacity="0.25" />
  </g>

  <!-- Slight dark gradient over lower area to deepen the reflection -->
  <rect x="0" y="320" width="512" height="192" fill="black" opacity="0.06" />
</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">

<svg width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">

    <linearGradient id="petalGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">

    <path d="M292 360 C352 380 352 440 292 450 C312 410 292 380 292 360" fill="url(#leafGrad)" opacity="0.95"/>

    <!-- stem -->

      <polygon points="100,70 106,90 124,96 106,102 100,122 94,102 76,96 94,90" fill="#fff7e6" opacity="0.9"/>
      <polygon points="420,80 426,94 440,100 426,106 420,120 414,106 400,100 414,94" fill="#fff2f8" opacity="0.95"/>
      <circle cx="360" cy="140" r="6" fill="#fff" opacity="0.9"/>
      <circle cx="420" cy="200" r="5" fill="#fff" opacity="0.85"/>
      <circle cx="120" cy="180" r="4" fill="#fff" opacity="0.85"/>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="sky" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#FFEEDB"/>
      <stop offset="60%" stop-color="#FFD6A6"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#FFEDE0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="sun" cx="0.2" cy="0.15" r="0.3">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#FFF7CC" stop-opacity="0.9"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#FFF7CC" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <filter id="soft" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="1.2"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- background sky -->
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="url(#sky)"/>
  <circle cx="102" cy="54" r="110" fill="url(#sun)"/>

  <!-- ground -->
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="460" rx="300" ry="70" fill="#6B4F2B" opacity="0.12"/>
  <rect x="0" y="420" width="512" height="92" fill="#EDE1C8"/>

  <!-- tree trunk -->
  <path d="M110 420 C120 340 130 300 140 250 C150 200 170 160 210 140 C230 130 248 132 260 150" stroke="#6B3E1E" stroke-width="28" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>

  <!-- branches -->
  <path d="M220 150 C260 140 320 120 360 160" stroke="#6B3E1E" stroke-width="18" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>
  <path d="M200 170 C250 180 300 200 340 210" stroke="#6B3E1E" stroke-width="12" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>
  <path d="M180 200 C220 210 260 230 300 240" stroke="#6B3E1E" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>

  <!-- leaf shape definition (reused via use -> path replicated with transforms) -->
  <g id="leaf" fill="#E07B2C" stroke="#8C3E16" stroke-width="1" transform="translate(-10,-20)">
    <path d="M20 4 C32 10 40 24 28 40 C16 24 24 10 36 4 C28 10 20 4 20 4 Z"/>
  </g>

  <!-- leaves attached to tree (still) -->
  <g transform="translate(300,160)">
    <use href="#leaf" transform="scale(1.6) rotate(-15)" fill="#D94E2A"/>
    <use href="#leaf" transform="translate(-40,10) scale(1.2) rotate(10)" fill="#E79A2F"/>
    <use href="#leaf" transform="translate(-10,28) scale(1.1) rotate(-40)" fill="#C94C2A"/>
  </g>

  <!-- falling leaves (mid-air) -->
  <g filter="url(#soft)">
    <use href="#leaf" transform="translate(360,210) scale(1.0) rotate(25)" fill="#F29D2F" opacity="0.95"/>
    <use href="#leaf" transform="translate(320,260) scale(0.9) rotate(-45)" fill="#D94E2A" opacity="0.95"/>
    <use href="#leaf" transform="translate(280,300) scale(0.85) rotate(10)" fill="#E7B03E" opacity="0.95"/>
    <use href="#leaf" transform="translate(200,320) scale(1.1) rotate(-80)" fill="#C85A2E" opacity="0.95"/>
    <use href="#leaf" transform="translate(140,330) scale(0.9) rotate(15)" fill="#F2A84B" opacity="0.95"/>
  </g>

  <!-- motion lines to imply falling -->
  <g stroke="#8C3E16" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none" opacity="0.5">
    <path d="M350 200 q-12 24 -8 48"/>
    <path d="M320 250 q-10 20 -14 40"/>
    <path d="M280 290 q6 18 0 36"/>
    <path d="M210 310 q-8 20 -20 36"/>
  </g>

  <!-- pile of leaves on ground -->
  <g transform="translate(150,430)">
    <path d="M0 0 C40 -30 120 -20 160 0 C180 10 160 30 120 26 C80 22 40 40 0 30 Z" fill="#C94C2A"/>
    <path d="M40 -6 C70 -28 140 -18 170 6 C190 22 160 40 120 34 C84 29 56 36 40 28 Z" fill="#E79A2F"/>
    <path d="M90 -2 C120 -22 190 -8 220 10 C240 24 200 40 160 36 C128 33 100 36 90 28 Z" fill="#F2B24B" opacity="0.95"/>
  </g>

  <!-- small scattered leaves on ground -->
  <g>
    <use href="#leaf" transform="translate(310,452) scale(0.6) rotate(120)" fill="#D94E2A"/>
    <use href="#leaf" transform="translate(360,440) scale(0.5) rotate(-20)" fill="#E7B03E"/>
    <use href="#leaf" transform="translate(250,470) scale(0.55) rotate(40)" fill="#C85A2E"/>
  </g>
</svg>

<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 512 512' width='512' height='512'>
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id='bgGrad' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='1'>
      <stop offset='0' stop-color='#f7fbff'/>
      <stop offset='1' stop-color='#e6f2ff'/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id='coinGrad' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='1'>
      <stop offset='0' stop-color='#ffe48c'/>
      <stop offset='1' stop-color='#d99e1a'/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id='barGrad' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0' y2='1'>
      <stop offset='0' stop-color='#7bd389'/>
      <stop offset='1' stop-color='#2ea45a'/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id='softShadow' x='-50%' y='-50%' width='200%' height='200%'>
      <feGaussianBlur in='SourceAlpha' stdDeviation='6' result='blur'/>
      <feOffset in='blur' dx='0' dy='6' result='off'/>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in='off'/>
        <feMergeNode in='SourceGraphic'/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- background -->
  <rect x='0' y='0' width='512' height='512' fill='url(#bgGrad)' />

  <!-- coins stack -->
  <g transform='translate(100,0)' filter='url(#softShadow)'>
    <!-- shadow ellipse under stack -->
    <ellipse cx='0' cy='445' rx='70' ry='16' fill='rgba(0,0,0,0.08)' />

    <!-- coins (ellipses stacked) -->
    <ellipse cx='0' cy='420' rx='48' ry='14' fill='url(#coinGrad)' stroke='#b27d12' stroke-width='2'/>
    <ellipse cx='0' cy='400' rx='48' ry='14' fill='url(#coinGrad)' stroke='#b27d12' stroke-width='2'/>
    <ellipse cx='0' cy='380' rx='48' ry='14' fill='url(#coinGrad)' stroke='#b27d12' stroke-width='2'/>
    <ellipse cx='0' cy='362' rx='48' ry='14' fill='url(#coinGrad)' stroke='#b27d12' stroke-width='2'/>
    <ellipse cx='0' cy='346' rx='48' ry='14' fill='url(#coinGrad)' stroke='#b27d12' stroke-width='2'/>

    <!-- top highlights -->
    <ellipse cx='-10' cy='338' rx='22' ry='6' fill='rgba(255,255,255,0.45)' />
    <ellipse cx='-8' cy='358' rx='18' ry='4' fill='rgba(255,255,255,0.25)' />
  </g>

  <!-- ascending bars (bar chart) -->
  <g transform='translate(0,0)'>
    <!-- baseline -->
    <rect x='180' y='450' width='180' height='6' rx='3' fill='#dfeff0' />

    <!-- bars -->
    <rect x='200' y='360' width='48' height='90' rx='6' fill='url(#barGrad)' />
    <rect x='268' y='300' width='48' height='150' rx='6' fill='url(#barGrad)' opacity='0.95' />
    <rect x='336' y='220' width='48' height='230' rx='6' fill='url(#barGrad)' opacity='0.9' />
    <rect x='404' y='150' width='48' height='300' rx='6' fill='url(#barGrad)' opacity='0.88' />
  </g>

  <!-- upward arrow indicating growth -->
  <g stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'>
    <path d='M120 430 C180 360, 260 300, 430 120' fill='none' stroke='#ff9f2e' stroke-width='18' stroke-opacity='0.95' />
    <!-- arrow head -->
    <polygon points='430,120 408,140 444,142' fill='#ff9f2e' stroke='#d46f00' stroke-width='2'/>
    <!-- subtle highlight on arrow -->
    <path d='M132 418 C188 360, 270 308, 420 140' fill='none' stroke='rgba(255,255,255,0.18)' stroke-width='6' stroke-linecap='round' />
  </g>

  <!-- small coin near bars to suggest investment allocation -->
  <g transform='translate(320,360)'>
    <ellipse cx='0' cy='0' rx='28' ry='8' fill='url(#coinGrad)' stroke='#b27d12' stroke-width='2'/>
    <ellipse cx='-8' cy='-8' rx='12' ry='4' fill='rgba(255,255,255,0.35)' />
  </g>

</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">

  <ellipse cx="256" cy="256" rx="160" ry="30" fill="#ffffff" transform="rotate(-20 256 256)" clip-path="url(#clipCircle)" />

    </defs>

    <use href="#star" transform="translate(316 266) scale(8)" />
    <use href="#star" transform="translate(196 286) scale(10)" />

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">

    </radialGradient>
    <linearGradient id="gOuter" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffb84d"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ff6a00"/>

    <linearGradient id="gMid" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">

      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ff3b00"/>

    <linearGradient id="gInner" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffffff"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ff9a00"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="gLog" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#6b3b18"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3f2513"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>

  <!-- background -->
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#0b0b0b" />

  <!-- soft glow behind the flame -->
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="320" rx="160" ry="120" fill="url(#gGlow)" opacity="0.9" />

  <!-- logs -->
  <g transform="translate(256,420)">
    <rect x="-140" y="-18" width="280" height="36" rx="18" fill="url(#gLog)" transform="rotate(-20)" />
    <rect x="-140" y="-18" width="280" height="36" rx="18" fill="url(#gLog)" transform="rotate(20)" />
  </g>

  <!-- outer flame -->
  <path d="M256 420 C170 420 120 320 170 250 C200 210 240 160 256 110 C272 160 312 210 342 250 C392 320 332 420 256 420 Z"
        fill="url(#gOuter)"/>

  <!-- middle flame -->
  <path d="M256 380 C200 380 160 320 200 260 C230 220 256 170 256 140 C256 170 292 220 312 260 C352 320 312 380 256 380 Z"
        fill="url(#gMid)"/>

  <!-- inner core -->
  <path d="M256 320 C232 320 200 280 224 240 C236 220 256 180 256 150 C256 180 278 220 288 240 C312 280 288 320 256 320 Z"
        fill="url(#gInner)"/>

  <!-- small sparks -->
  <g fill="#ffd76a" opacity="0.9">

    <circle cx="330" cy="190" r="5" />
    <circle cx="260" cy="90" r="7" />
    <circle cx="220" cy="260" r="4" />
    <circle cx="300" cy="250" r="4" />
  </g>
</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="wingGrad" x1="0" x2="1" y1="0" y2="1">

    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="bodyGrad" x1="0" x2="1" y1="0" y2="0">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#2E8B57" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#1E6B4A" />

      <feOffset dx="0" dy="6" result="o" />

      <!-- wing veins right top -->

      <path d="M40,-4 C90,-90 210,-110 240,-36" fill="none" stroke="#6FBBD6" stroke-opacity="0.5" stroke-width="0.9" />

      <!-- wing veins right bottom -->

      <path d="M30,12 C100,90 200,100 240,28" fill="none" stroke="#6FBBD6" stroke-opacity="0.6" stroke-width="1" />

      <!-- mirror left wings -->

        <path d="M12,-12 C140,-150 320,-120 240,-20 C180,-10 80,-2 12,0 Z" fill="url(#wingGrad)" fill-opacity="0.75" />
        <path d="M18,8 C150,120 320,100 240,20 C170,10 80,8 18,8 Z" fill="url(#wingGrad)" fill-opacity="0.7" />
        <path d="M18,-6 C80,-70 160,-98 220,-36" fill="none" stroke="#6FBBD6" stroke-opacity="0.8" stroke-width="1.5" />
        <path d="M18,-2 C60,-40 120,-70 200,-30" fill="none" stroke="#6FBBD6" stroke-opacity="0.7" stroke-width="1" />
        <path d="M40,-4 C90,-90 210,-110 240,-36" fill="none" stroke="#6FBBD6" stroke-opacity="0.5" stroke-width="0.9" />
        <path d="M24,10 C80,60 140,80 220,28" fill="none" stroke="#6FBBD6" stroke-opacity="0.8" stroke-width="1.5" />
        <path d="M30,12 C100,90 200,100 240,28" fill="none" stroke="#6FBBD6" stroke-opacity="0.6" stroke-width="1" />
      </g>
    </g>

    <!-- Body and head -->
    <g filter="url(#softShadow)">
      <!-- thorax -->
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="20" ry="16" fill="url(#bodyGrad)" stroke="#123" stroke-opacity="0.12" stroke-width="1" />

      <!-- head -->

        <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="18" fill="#2F9B6E" stroke="#0f4033" stroke-opacity="0.12" stroke-width="1" />

        <ellipse cx="6" cy="-2" rx="8" ry="10" fill="#0B5B4A" fill-opacity="0.95" />
        <ellipse cx="-4" cy="-4" rx="2" ry="3" fill="#6FEAD1" fill-opacity="0.5" />
        <ellipse cx="8" cy="-4" rx="2" ry="3" fill="#6FEAD1" fill-opacity="0.5" />
        <!-- antennae -->

        <path d="M8,-14 C18,-26 32,-34 36,-42" stroke="#19433a" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none" />
      </g>

      <!-- abdomen segments -->

        <!-- tail tip -->
        <path d="M177,0 C187,-3 195,-1 203,0 C195,1 187,3 177,0 Z" fill="#0e3e33" />
        <!-- segment separators -->
        <path d="M44,-8 L44,8" stroke="#0b2f24" stroke-width="1" stroke-opacity="0.12" />

        <path d="M108,-7 L108,7" stroke="#0b2f24" stroke-width="1" stroke-opacity="0.12" />

        <path d="M156,-5 L156,5" stroke="#0b2f24" stroke-width="1" stroke-opacity="0.12" />

        <path d="M30,-40 C120,-110 230,-100 240,-36" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" />
        <path d="M34,40 C120,100 230,92 240,28" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" />
      </g>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <!-- Background -->

  <!-- Ground -->

  <rect x="124" y="120" width="8" height="320" rx="3" fill="#323232" />

  <rect x="232" y="320" width="12" height="28" rx="3" fill="#222" opacity="0.3" />

  <rect x="10" y="356" width="130" height="16" rx="4" fill="#2e2e2e" />

  <!-- Body of forklift -->

  <rect x="320" y="236" width="60" height="28" rx="4" fill="#22313a" opacity="0.6" />
  <!-- Seat inside cabin -->
  <rect x="332" y="266" width="34" height="26" rx="4" fill="#1f2b33" />

  <!-- Headlight -->
  <circle cx="420" cy="300" r="10" fill="#ffd26b" stroke="#c58b00" stroke-width="2" />

  <!-- Wheels -->
  <g>

    <circle cx="360" cy="400" r="20" fill="#666" />

  <!-- Overlap shading to show wheel behind body -->

  <!-- Lift chains/links from carriage to top of mast -->
  <line x1="150" y1="312" x2="120" y2="140" stroke="#2b2b2b" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
  <line x1="170" y1="312" x2="140" y2="140" stroke="#2b2b2b" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />

  <rect x="10" y="356" width="130" height="4" fill="#4b4b4b" opacity="0.12" />

  <!-- Simple bumper/step -->
  <rect x="208" y="340" width="20" height="28" rx="4" fill="#c49b00" opacity="0.9" />

</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512"> <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#cfeefc"/> <rect y="380" width="512" height="132" fill="#a6d24a"/> <g> <circle cx="150" cy="310" r="70" fill="#111" stroke="#333" stroke-width="6"/> <circle cx="150" cy="310" r="35" fill="#bdbdbd"/> <circle cx="360" cy="330" r="50" fill="#111" stroke="#333" stroke-width="6"/> <circle cx="360" cy="330" r="25" fill="#bdbdbd"/> </g> <rect x="200" y="230" width="170" height="70" rx="12" fill="#d9534f" stroke="#b33a3a" stroke-width="4"/> <rect x="80" y="150" width="150" height="120" rx="12" fill="#d9534f" stroke="#b33a3a" stroke-width="4"/> <rect x="100" y="170" width="110" height="80" rx="6" fill="#aee9ff"/> <polygon points="370,230 430,260 430,300 370,300" fill="#d9534f" stroke="#b33a3a" stroke-width="4"/> <g fill="#6b6b6b"> <rect x="382" y="265" width="10" height="30" rx="2"/> <rect x="396" y="265" width="10" height="30" rx="2"/> <rect x="410" y="265" width="10" height="30" rx="2"/> </g> <rect x="300" y="130" width="12" height="70" rx="3" fill="#555"/> <circle cx="306" cy="126" r="8" fill="#333"/> <path d="M100,320 A60,40 0 0 0 200,320" fill="#d9534f" opacity="0.95" stroke="#b33a3a" stroke-width="3"/> <path d="M290,350 A44,30 0 0 0 430,350" fill="#d9534f" opacity="0.95" stroke="#b33a3a" stroke-width="3"/> <rect x="150" y="330" width="220" height="12" rx="6" fill="#5c4033"/> <circle cx="440" cy="280" r="10" fill="#fffacd" stroke="#f0e68c" stroke-width="2"/> </svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#efe7dd" />

  <!-- Chessboard using a 2x2 tile pattern (each square 48px, board 384px) -->
  <defs>
    <pattern id="checker" width="96" height="96" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="48" height="48" fill="#f0d9b5" />
      <rect x="48" y="0" width="48" height="48" fill="#b58863" />
      <rect x="0" y="48" width="48" height="48" fill="#b58863" />
      <rect x="48" y="48" width="48" height="48" fill="#f0d9b5" />
    </pattern>
    <!-- subtle shadow filter -->
    <filter id="soft" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="6" result="b" />
      <feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- board frame -->
  <rect x="60" y="60" width="392" height="392" rx="8" fill="#8b5a2b" />
  <rect x="64" y="64" width="384" height="384" rx="6" fill="url(#checker)" />

  <!-- shadows for pieces -->
  <ellipse cx="328" cy="320" rx="36" ry="10" fill="#000" opacity="0.25" filter="url(#soft)" />
  <ellipse cx="232" cy="330" rx="50" ry="12" fill="#000" opacity="0.18" filter="url(#soft)" />

  <!-- Rook (standing, delivering mate) on a square toward the right -->
  <g transform="translate(328,232)">
    <!-- base plinth -->
    <rect x="-20" y="22" width="40" height="10" rx="3" fill="#222" />
    <rect x="-16" y="-20" width="32" height="42" rx="6" fill="#111" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-opacity="0.06" stroke-width="2" />
    <!-- crenellations -->
    <rect x="-16" y="-34" width="10" height="14" fill="#111" />
    <rect x="-2" y="-34" width="10" height="14" fill="#111" />
    <rect x="12" y="-34" width="10" height="14" fill="#111" />
    <!-- narrow band under crenellations -->
    <rect x="-18" y="-22" width="36" height="6" fill="#222" />
  </g>

  <!-- King (tipped over to indicate checkmate) -->
  <g transform="translate(232,268) rotate(-35) scale(1.05)">
    <!-- body/stack -->
    <rect x="-22" y="6" width="44" height="10" rx="4" fill="#111" />
    <rect x="-16" y="-14" width="32" height="20" rx="8" fill="#111" />
    <circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="18" fill="#111" />
    <!-- crown: three small rounded peaks -->
    <g fill="#111">
      <ellipse cx="-12" cy="-40" rx="6" ry="6" />
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="-44" rx="6" ry="6" />
      <ellipse cx="12" cy="-40" rx="6" ry="6" />
      <rect x="-18" y="-36" width="36" height="6" rx="2" />
    </g>
    <!-- small decorative band and base detail -->
    <rect x="-10" y="-6" width="20" height="4" rx="2" fill="#222" />
    <rect x="-30" y="16" width="60" height="8" rx="4" fill="#111" />
    <!-- faint highlight stroke to separate from board -->
    <path d="M-12 8 L12 8" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-opacity="0.05" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" />
  </g>

  <!-- small visual cue: a tilted, narrow broken ring near king to imply defeat (no text) -->
  <g transform="translate(232,268) rotate(-35)">
    <path d="M30 18 A22 22 0 1 0 12 -6" fill="none" stroke="#a33" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.9" />
  </g>

</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#fff7d1" />
      <stop offset="40%" stop-color="#ffe08a" />
      <stop offset="70%" stop-color="#7aa0e0" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0b1b2b" />
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="doorLight" cx="50%" cy="70%" r="60%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#fff8cf" stop-opacity="1" />
      <stop offset="45%" stop-color="#ffe089" stop-opacity="0.95" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ffdb6b" stop-opacity="0.6" />
    </radialGradient>
    <linearGradient id="pathGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#fff7d1" stop-opacity="0.95" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#cda85a" stop-opacity="0.9" />
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>

  <!-- background -->
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="url(#bg)" />

  <!-- light rays from doorway -->
  <g opacity="0.95">
    <polygon points="256,240 236,90 276,90" fill="#fff6c3" opacity="0.25" />
    <polygon points="256,240 206,70 226,70" fill="#fff3a8" opacity="0.18" />
    <polygon points="256,240 306,70 286,70" fill="#fff3a8" opacity="0.18" />
    <polygon points="256,240 166,130 186,120" fill="#fff7c9" opacity="0.12" />
    <polygon points="256,240 346,130 326,120" fill="#fff7c9" opacity="0.12" />
  </g>

  <!-- path leading out (perspective trapezoid) -->
  <polygon points="166,420 346,420 460,512 52,512" fill="url(#pathGrad)" opacity="0.95" />

  <!-- doorway frame (outer) -->
  <path d="M146 420 L146 380 A110 110 0 0 1 366 380 L366 420 Z" fill="#2b2b2b" />
  <!-- inner glowing arch -->
  <path d="M166 420 L166 390 A90 90 0 0 1 346 390 L346 420 Z" fill="url(#doorLight)" />

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bgGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0f2740" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#071726" />
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="haloGrad" cx="50%" cy="40%" r="45%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#fffde7" stop-opacity="1" />
      <stop offset="40%" stop-color="#fff59d" stop-opacity="0.95" />
      <stop offset="75%" stop-color="#ffd166" stop-opacity="0.7" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ffd166" stop-opacity="0" />
    </radialGradient>
    <linearGradient id="rayGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#fff9c4" stop-opacity="1" />

      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ff8a65" stop-opacity="0" />
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="glow">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="8" result="b" />
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in="b" />
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic" />

    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="url(#bgGrad)" />

  <!-- Radiant halo and rays centered above the figure -->
  <g transform="translate(256,220)">
    <!-- Rays -->
    <g stroke="url(#rayGrad)" stroke-linecap="round" filter="url(#glow)">
      <!-- many rays by rotation -->
      <line x1="0" y1="40" x2="0" y2="-160" stroke-width="6" opacity="0.9" />
      <line x1="0" y1="40" x2="0" y2="-150" stroke-width="5" opacity="0.8" transform="rotate(15)" />
      <line x1="0" y1="40" x2="0" y2="-150" stroke-width="5" opacity="0.8" transform="rotate(-15)" />
      <line x1="0" y1="40" x2="0" y2="-140" stroke-width="4" opacity="0.75" transform="rotate(30)" />
      <line x1="0" y1="40" x2="0" y2="-140" stroke-width="4" opacity="0.75" transform="rotate(-30)" />
      <line x1="0" y1="40" x2="0" y2="-130" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.6" transform="rotate(45)" />
      <line x1="0" y1="40" x2="0" y2="-130" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.6" transform="rotate(-45)" />

      <line x1="0" y1="40" x2="0" y2="-120" stroke-width="2.5" opacity="0.5" transform="rotate(-60)" />
    </g>

    <!-- Halo glow -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="68" fill="url(#haloGrad)" filter="url(#glow)" />
  </g>

    <circle cx="256" cy="220" r="28" fill="#071f2e" />

  </g>

    <ellipse rx="36" ry="18" fill="#f48fb1" transform="rotate(20)" opacity="0.95" />

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="g1" x1="0" x2="1" y1="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#7fb3d5"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#2e86ab"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="g2" x1="0" x2="1" y1="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#9ad0c9"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#2f9687"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="g3" x1="0" x2="1" y1="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#caa3e6"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#7a4ea8"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="shadow" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="6" stdDeviation="8" flood-color="#000" flood-opacity="0.25"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- background -->
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#f6f7fb"/>

  <!-- Penrose-like impossible triangle: three thick bands -->
  <!-- Left band (AB) -->
  <g filter="url(#shadow)">
    <g transform="translate(176,248) rotate(118)">
      <rect x="-172" y="-36" width="344" height="72" rx="14" fill="url(#g1)" stroke="#1f3a47" stroke-opacity="0.7" stroke-width="4"/>
    </g>

    <!-- Bottom band (BC) -->
    <g transform="translate(256,400) rotate(0)">
      <rect x="-160" y="-36" width="320" height="72" rx="14" fill="url(#g2)" stroke="#163a35" stroke-opacity="0.7" stroke-width="4"/>
    </g>

    <!-- Right band (CA) -->
    <g transform="translate(336,248) rotate(-62)">
      <rect x="-172" y="-36" width="344" height="72" rx="14" fill="url(#g3)" stroke="#3b2650" stroke-opacity="0.7" stroke-width="4"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- Overlap cuts to create impossible effect -->
  <!-- At corner between left and bottom: make bottom appear above left -->
  <g>
    <path d="M176,248 L256,400 L220,381 L151,260 Z" fill="#2f9687" stroke="#163a35" stroke-opacity="0.7" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M176,248 L256,400 L293,360 L211,248 Z" fill="#7fb3d5" opacity="0.95" stroke="#1f3a47" stroke-opacity="0.6" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>

  <!-- At corner between bottom and right: make right appear above bottom -->
  <g>
    <path d="M256,400 L336,248 L312,220 L260,360 Z" fill="#7a4ea8" stroke="#3b2650" stroke-opacity="0.7" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M336,248 L256,400 L293,360 L346,260 Z" fill="#9ad0c9" opacity="0.95" stroke="#163a35" stroke-opacity="0.6" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>

  <!-- At corner between right and left: make left appear above right -->
  <g>
    <path d="M336,248 L176,248 L220,236 L312,220 Z" fill="#caa3e6" stroke="#3b2650" stroke-opacity="0.7" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M176,248 L336,248 L293,281 L211,260 Z" fill="#7fb3d5" opacity="0.95" stroke="#1f3a47" stroke-opacity="0.6" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>

  <!-- central negative space to emphasize the impossible loop -->
  <polygon points="256,160 216,240 296,240" fill="#f6f7fb"/>

  <!-- subtle inner highlight lines -->
  <g stroke="#ffffff" stroke-opacity="0.12" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round">
    <path d="M142,292 L210,264"/>
    <path d="M370,292 L302,264"/>
    <path d="M170,220 L242,208"/>
  </g>

</svg>

    <!-- shorter inner spikes -->

    <path d="M256 256 L266 120 L246 120 Z" fill="#fff2c6" opacity="0.9" transform="rotate(135 256 256)"/>
    <path d="M256 256 L266 120 L246 120 Z" fill="#fff2c6" opacity="0.9" transform="rotate(225 256 256)"/>
  </g>

  <!-- glowing shockwave rings -->
  <g filter="url(#softBlur)" opacity="0.85">
    <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="90" fill="none" stroke="#ffd99a" stroke-width="10" stroke-opacity="0.45"/>
    <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="140" fill="none" stroke="#ff8a33" stroke-width="14" stroke-opacity="0.35"/>
    <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="210" fill="none" stroke="#ff4d00" stroke-width="20" stroke-opacity="0.2"/>
  </g>

  <!-- central bright core -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="64" fill="url(#coreGrad)" />
  <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="18" fill="#ffffff" opacity="1"/>

  <!-- ejected debris particles -->
  <g>
    <circle cx="340" cy="160" r="4" fill="#ffcf8a" opacity="0.95"/>
    <circle cx="380" cy="200" r="3" fill="#ff9b4a" opacity="0.9"/>
    <circle cx="430" cy="230" r="2.5" fill="#fff6d8" opacity="0.9"/>

</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <radialGradient id="holeGrad" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#000000" />
      <stop offset="60%" stop-color="#030305" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0b0b12" />
    </radialGradient>
    <radialGradient id="diskGlow" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="rgba(255,240,180,0.95)" />
      <stop offset="40%" stop-color="rgba(255,150,60,0.95)" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="rgba(60,10,10,0.0)" />
    </radialGradient>
    <linearGradient id="diskStrip" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffdca3" />
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#ff8b2a" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#5a0f00" />
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="blurSoft" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="6" />
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <!-- deep space background -->
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#030215" />

  <!-- scattered stars -->
  <g fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.9">
    <circle cx="36" cy="48" r="1.8" />
    <circle cx="480" cy="28" r="1.4" />
    <circle cx="420" cy="84" r="1.2" />
    <circle cx="290" cy="30" r="1.3" />
    <circle cx="130" cy="110" r="1.6" />
    <circle cx="80" cy="190" r="1.1" />
    <circle cx="200" cy="60" r="1.0" />
    <circle cx="360" cy="160" r="1.3" />
    <circle cx="460" cy="220" r="1.6" />
    <circle cx="32" cy="300" r="1.2" />
    <circle cx="140" cy="360" r="1.4" />
    <circle cx="260" cy="420" r="1.6" />
    <circle cx="380" cy="360" r="1.2" />
    <circle cx="500" cy="420" r="1.0" />
    <circle cx="420" cy="300" r="1.3" />
  </g>

  <!-- smeared lensed star arcs (gravitational lensing effect) -->
  <g stroke="#ffffff" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none" opacity="0.18">
    <path d="M76,256 C140,112 372,112 436,256" stroke-width="6" stroke-linejoin="round" />
    <path d="M92,256 C152,140 360,140 420,256" stroke-width="4" />
    <path d="M108,256 C165,170 348,170 404,256" stroke-width="2" />
  </g>

  <!-- accretion disk glow (blurred) -->
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="256" rx="210" ry="90" fill="url(#diskGlow)" filter="url(#blurSoft)" opacity="0.9" />

  <!-- accretion disk main, slightly tilted -->
  <g transform="translate(0,12)">
    <ellipse cx="256" cy="256" rx="200" ry="80" fill="url(#diskStrip)" opacity="0.95" />
    <!-- inner brighter ring -->
    <ellipse cx="256" cy="256" rx="140" ry="56" fill="url(#diskGlow)" opacity="0.85" />
    <!-- thin luminous edges -->
    <ellipse cx="256" cy="256" rx="202" ry="82" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,230,160,0.9)" stroke-width="2" />
    <ellipse cx="256" cy="256" rx="138" ry="55" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,240,180,0.95)" stroke-width="2" />
  </g>

  <!-- event horizon (dark center) -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="256" r="72" fill="url(#holeGrad)" />

  <!-- shadowed inner rim to suggest strong gravity -->
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="256" rx="92" ry="38" fill="rgba(0,0,0,0.75)" />

  <!-- small bright streaks near disk to suggest in-falling matter -->
  <g stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
    <path d="M330,210 C340,220 350,230 360,240" stroke="rgba(255,220,140,0.9)" stroke-width="4" opacity="0.85" />
    <path d="M180,300 C190,290 200,280 210,270" stroke="rgba(255,180,70,0.9)" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.8" />
    <path d="M300,320 C310,312 320,305 330,298" stroke="rgba(255,160,50,0.85)" stroke-width="2.5" opacity="0.75" />
  </g>

</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#f5e6ff"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#e6fff5"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <pattern id="checks" width="40" height="40" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <rect width="40" height="40" fill="#cfe8ff"/>
      <rect width="20" height="20" fill="#ffffff"/>
      <rect x="20" y="20" width="20" height="20" fill="#ffffff"/>
    </pattern>
    <radialGradient id="iris" cx="50%" cy="40%" r="60%">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#6ec6ff"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#004a7f"/>
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>

  <!-- background -->
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="url(#bg)"/>

  <!-- tilted checker ground -->
  <g transform="translate(0,280) skewX(-20)">
    <rect x="-80" y="0" width="680" height="260" fill="url(#checks)" opacity="0.95"/>
  </g>

  <!-- sinuous branch -->
  <path d="M120 220 C160 200,220 190,300 210" stroke="#5b371e" stroke-width="14" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none"/>

  <!-- melting clock draped over branch -->
  <g transform="translate(210,195) rotate(-15)">
    <path d="M-80,0 C-100,60 -20,110 60,90 C120,75 120,20 90,-10 C40,-40 -10,-20 -40,-10 C-60,-5 -70,-20 -80,0 Z" fill="#fff4b2" stroke="#4a3a21" stroke-width="3"/>
    <!-- drips -->
    <path d="M20,60 C18,90 8,110 18,130 C28,150 40,142 44,128 C48,115 40,100 34,90" fill="#fff4b2" stroke="#4a3a21" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M-40,50 C-42,70 -38,90 -30,110 C-18,135 -4,128 0,112 C4,98 -4,88 -10,80" fill="#fff4b2" stroke="#4a3a21" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>

  <!-- floating eye -->
  <g transform="translate(400,90) rotate(-10)">
    <ellipse rx="60" ry="36" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3"/>
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="26" ry="26" fill="url(#iris)"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="10" fill="#000"/>
    <circle cx="-8" cy="-6" r="4" fill="#fff" opacity="0.95"/>
  </g>

  <!-- floating skewed cube -->
  <g transform="translate(120,120) rotate(20)">
    <polygon points="0,0 60,15 60,75 0,60" fill="#ffd1dc" stroke="#9b6b6b" stroke-width="2"/>
    <polygon points="60,15 120,0 120,60 60,75" fill="#ffdbe8" stroke="#9b6b6b" stroke-width="2"/>
    <polygon points="0,0 60,15 120,0 60,-15" fill="#ffe4f0" stroke="#9b6b6b" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>

  <!-- stairs leading to an arch (nowhere) -->
  <g transform="translate(360,320) rotate(-10)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="120" height="20" fill="#7f6f60"/>
    <rect x="10" y="-30" width="110" height="20" fill="#8b7b6a"/>
    <rect x="20" y="-60" width="100" height="20" fill="#a08978"/>
    <rect x="30" y="-90" width="90" height="20" fill="#b59c8a"/>
    <path d="M75,-110 a30,20 0 0,1 30,20 v30 h-120 v-30 a30,20 0 0,1 30,-20 z" fill="#fff4d6" stroke="#5b4b3b" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.98"/>
  </g>

  <!-- small surreal fish floating -->
  <g transform="translate(260,240) rotate(-20)">
    <path d="M-30,0 q30,-20 60,0 q-30,20 -60,0" fill="#9fe0ff" stroke="#3c94a8" stroke-width="2"/>
    <polygon points="60,0 80,-12 80,12" fill="#9fe0ff" stroke="#3c94a8" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>

  <!-- little floating lights -->
  <g fill="#fff" opacity="0.9">
    <circle cx="70" cy="60" r="3"/>
    <circle cx="110" cy="40" r="2.5"/>
    <circle cx="450" cy="30" r="3"/>
    <circle cx="330" cy="140" r="2.5"/>
  </g>

</svg>
