<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#aee0ff"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#68b6e6"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="bubble" cx="30%" cy="30%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0.9"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>

  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="url(#bg)"/>

  <!-- shark group -->
  <g>
    <!-- shadow under shark -->
    <ellipse cx="270" cy="355" rx="130" ry="18" fill="#000000" fill-opacity="0.12"/>

    <!-- main body -->
    <ellipse cx="270" cy="270" rx="170" ry="70" fill="#7b8c97"/>
    <!-- lighter belly -->
    <ellipse cx="240" cy="300" rx="130" ry="48" fill="#e8f0f2"/>

    <!-- tail (two layered polygons for simple shape) -->
    <polygon points="430,250 500,220 480,285 430,270" fill="#6b7b82"/>
    <polygon points="420,255 480,230 465,275 420,270" fill="#5b6a70"/>

    <!-- dorsal fin (two layered for slight shading) -->
    <polygon points="210,210 260,160 300,200 240,205" fill="#6b7b82"/>
    <polygon points="220,215 260,170 295,205 245,210" fill="#5b6a70" opacity="0.95"/>

    <!-- mouth (dark) and teeth -->
    <path d="M150 285 C170 300,190 305,220 300 C205 290,180 285,150 285 Z" fill="#2f3b42"/>
    <g fill="#ffffff">
      <path d="M155 285 L165 300 L150 300 Z"/>
      <path d="M170 290 L180 305 L165 305 Z"/>
      <path d="M185 292 L195 307 L180 307 Z"/>
    </g>

    <!-- eye with highlight -->
    <circle cx="185" cy="245" r="9" fill="#0b0b0c"/>
    <circle cx="181" cy="241" r="3" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.9"/>

    <!-- gill slits -->
    <g stroke="#4f5a60" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none">
      <path d="M200 250 Q220 255 245 252"/>
      <path d="M210 265 Q230 270 255 267"/>
      <path d="M220 280 Q240 285 265 282"/>
    </g>

    <!-- bubbles -->
    <circle cx="380" cy="120" r="12" fill="url(#bubble)" opacity="0.8"/>
    <circle cx="405" cy="90" r="8" fill="url(#bubble)" opacity="0.8"/>
    <circle cx="320" cy="80" r="6" fill="url(#bubble)" opacity="0.7"/>
  </g>
</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bgGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#02030a"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#071428"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="planetGrad" cx="40%" cy="35%" r="60%">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#ff7a4f"/>
      <stop offset="0.6" stop-color="#d84a2c"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#7f2418"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <radialGradient id="craterGrad" cx="30%" cy="30%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#7a2a21"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#3f120d"/>
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="url(#bgGrad)" />

  <!-- Stars -->
  <g fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.9">
    <circle cx="40" cy="60" r="1.6" opacity="0.9"/>
    <circle cx="80" cy="120" r="1.2" opacity="0.7"/>
    <circle cx="140" cy="40" r="1.8" opacity="0.9"/>
    <circle cx="220" cy="90" r="1.1" opacity="0.6"/>
    <circle cx="460" cy="50" r="1.4" opacity="0.8"/>
    <circle cx="430" cy="160" r="1.0" opacity="0.6"/>
    <circle cx="360" cy="30" r="1.3" opacity="0.7"/>
    <circle cx="280" cy="120" r="1.0" opacity="0.6"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Mars: main disc -->
  <g>
    <circle cx="312" cy="270" r="160" fill="url(#planetGrad)" />

    <!-- Surface darker regions -->

      <ellipse cx="11" cy="-66" rx="12" ry="8" fill="#F3CF6A" stroke="#C99C3B" stroke-width="1"/>

      <ellipse cx="9" cy="-114" rx="9" ry="6" fill="#F3CF6A" stroke="#C99C3B" stroke-width="1"/>
    </g>

    <!-- center stalk (upright) -->
    <g transform="rotate(0)">
      <path d="M0 0 C2 -36 2 -72 0 -132" stroke="#7A4A25" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <ellipse cx="10" cy="-20" rx="13" ry="9" fill="#FFD780" stroke="#C99C3B" stroke-width="1"/>
      <ellipse cx="-10" cy="-44" rx="13" ry="9" fill="#FFD780" stroke="#C99C3B" stroke-width="1"/>
      <ellipse cx="10" cy="-68" rx="13" ry="9" fill="#FFD780" stroke="#C99C3B" stroke-width="1"/>
      <ellipse cx="-8" cy="-92" rx="12" ry="8" fill="#FFD780" stroke="#C99C3B" stroke-width="1"/>
      <ellipse cx="10" cy="-116" rx="9" ry="6" fill="#FFD780" stroke="#C99C3B" stroke-width="1"/>

      <ellipse cx="-12" cy="-24" rx="12" ry="8" fill="#F2C85F" stroke="#C99C3B" stroke-width="1"/>
      <ellipse cx="6" cy="-48" rx="11" ry="7.5" fill="#F2C85F" stroke="#C99C3B" stroke-width="1"/>

      <ellipse cx="-12" cy="-112" rx="8" ry="5.5" fill="#F2C85F" stroke="#C99C3B" stroke-width="1"/>

  </g>

</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#f6f6f6"/>
  <!-- Coffee cup -->
  <g transform="translate(90,260)">
    <ellipse cx="120" cy="80" rx="120" ry="40" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#c0c0c0" stroke-width="4"/>
    <path d="M0 80 h240 v40 a20 20 0 0 1 -20 20 h-200 a20 20 0 0 1 -20 -20 z" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#c0c0c0" stroke-width="4"/>
    <ellipse cx="120" cy="70" rx="92" ry="28" fill="#3b2f2f"/>
    <path d="M240 80 a40 30 0 0 0 0 -60" fill="none" stroke="#c0c0c0" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <g fill="#7b5b3d" opacity="0.8">
      <ellipse cx="120" cy="60" rx="72" ry="18"/>
    </g>
    <path d="M90 30 q20 -30 60 0 q40 -30 60 0" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.18"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Taster face -->
  <g transform="translate(280,110)">
    <circle cx="120" cy="140" r="120" fill="#ffdfc4" stroke="#d9ab84" stroke-width="4"/>
    <!-- Eyes -->
    <path d="M70 110 q20 15 40 0" fill="none" stroke="#6b4b3a" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <path d="M170 110 q20 15 40 0" fill="none" stroke="#6b4b3a" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <!-- Nose -->
    <path d="M120 120 q6 20 -6 24" fill="none" stroke="#c38f66" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <!-- Mouth open with tongue -->
    <ellipse cx="120" cy="190" rx="40" ry="28" fill="#6b4b3a"/>
    <ellipse cx="120" cy="190" rx="30" ry="18" fill="#ffb3b3"/>
    <!-- Tongue details: three small dark triangles to indicate bitter taste -->
    <g fill="#3b2f2f" transform="translate(105,182)">
      <polygon points="0,10 8,0 16,10"/>
      <polygon points="24,14 32,4 40,14"/>
      <polygon points="-8,14 0,4 8,14"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Hand holding spoon near cup -->
    <path d="M200 240 q30 10 50 -10" fill="none" stroke="#ffdfc4" stroke-width="18" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <rect x="220" y="210" width="40" height="12" rx="6" fill="#bdbdbd" transform="rotate(-35 240 216)"/>
    <ellipse cx="238" cy="200" rx="14" ry="8" fill="#6b4b3a" stroke="#5a4638" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Small bitter indicator: zigzag lines near tongue -->
  <g transform="translate(340,250)">
    <path d="M0 0 l8 -12 l8 12 l8 -12 l8 12" fill="none" stroke="#3b2f2f" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>
</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512"><defs><linearGradient id="g" x1="0" x2="0" y1="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#ff4b4b"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#c90000"/></linearGradient><filter id="ds" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%"><feDropShadow dx="0" dy="8" stdDeviation="12" flood-color="#000" flood-opacity="0.35"/></filter></defs><rect width="512" height="512" fill="#f6f6f6"/><g filter="url(#ds)"><rect x="46" y="126" width="420" height="260" rx="56" fill="url(#g)" stroke="#a30000" stroke-width="4"/></g><polygon points="220,216 220,296 320,256" fill="#fff"/><ellipse cx="256" cy="256" rx="200" ry="120" fill="none" opacity="0.05"/></svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#8fd3ff"/>
  <defs>
    <pattern id="grass" x="0" y="0" width="32" height="32" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">

      <rect x="0" y="16" width="16" height="16" fill="#4fae31"/>

    <pattern id="dirt" x="0" y="0" width="32" height="32" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">

      <rect x="0" y="16" width="16" height="16" fill="#7f4e33"/>

  <polygon points="112,196 256,272 256,416 112,340" fill="url(#dirt)" stroke="#5b3b2a" stroke-width="4"/>

      <rect x="0" y="-10" width="70" height="22" fill="#bfbfbf"/>
      <rect x="6" y="-6" width="58" height="12" fill="#909090"/>
      <rect x="-6" y="18" width="22" height="10" fill="#bfbfbf" transform="rotate(40 5 23)"/>

  </g>
</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>

      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#98e082" />

    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="billGrad2" x1="0" x2="0" y1="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#b7f1a6" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7fd56d" />
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="coinGrad" x1="0" x2="1" y1="0" y2="1">

    <filter id="soft" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">

  <!-- Stack of bills (three overlapping rounded rectangles) -->

    <rect x="66" y="170" width="380" height="220" rx="20" fill="url(#billGrad1)" stroke="#4d8f36" stroke-width="6" />

    <rect x="56" y="150" width="380" height="220" rx="20" fill="url(#billGrad2)" stroke="#4d8f36" stroke-width="6" opacity="0.95" />
    <!-- top bill (front) -->
    <rect x="46" y="130" width="380" height="220" rx="20" fill="#89d46a" stroke="#3f7c30" stroke-width="6" />

    <!-- decorative emblems on top bill -->
    <!-- central emblem -->

    <circle cx="256" cy="240" r="20" fill="#7ab24a" />
    <!-- corner motifs -->
    <circle cx="110" cy="190" r="14" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.9" stroke="#cfead0" stroke-width="3" />
    <circle cx="402" cy="190" r="14" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.9" stroke="#cfead0" stroke-width="3" />
    <circle cx="110" cy="310" r="14" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.9" stroke="#cfead0" stroke-width="3" />
    <circle cx="402" cy="310" r="14" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.9" stroke="#cfead0" stroke-width="3" />

    <!-- subtle horizontal pattern lines on bills -->
    <g stroke="#6aa755" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.35">
      <path d="M86 200 H426" />
      <path d="M86 280 H426" />
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- Coin overlapping the right side -->

    <circle cx="360" cy="340" r="78" fill="url(#coinGrad)" stroke="#b37a00" stroke-width="6" />
    <circle cx="360" cy="340" r="52" fill="#ffd779" opacity="0.25" />
    <!-- rim highlight -->
    <path d="M300 300 C320 260, 400 260, 420 300" fill="none" stroke="#fff8b8" stroke-width="6" opacity="0.25" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <!-- small inner ring -->
    <circle cx="360" cy="340" r="28" fill="#efb200" opacity="0.9" />
    <circle cx="360" cy="340" r="14" fill="#ffd" opacity="0.7" />

  <ellipse cx="256" cy="420" rx="160" ry="28" fill="#000" opacity="0.12" />

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="skyGrad" x1="0" x2="0" y1="0" y2="1">

      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#E8F7FF" />

  <!-- Background sky -->
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="url(#skyGrad)" />

  <circle cx="400" cy="110" r="62" fill="#E53935" opacity="0.95" />

    <path d="M0 120 L0 80 L36 80 L36 40 L78 40 L78 80 L120 80 L120 60 L162 60 L162 80 L200 80 L200 20 L240 20 L240 80 L280 80 L280 40 L322 40 L322 80 L364 80 L364 20 L404 20 L404 80 L456 80 L456 60 L512 60 L512 120 Z" fill="url(#groundGrad)" />

    <polygon points="206,320 231,180 235,180 210,320" fill="#FFFFFF" opacity="0.9" />
    <polygon points="292,380 266,210 262,210 288,380" fill="#FFFFFF" opacity="0.9" />
    <polygon points="289,320 264,180 260,180 285,320" fill="#FFFFFF" opacity="0.9" />

      <line x1="220" y1="360" x2="246" y2="220" />
      <line x1="230" y1="360" x2="254" y2="220" />
      <line x1="280" y1="360" x2="252" y2="220" />
      <line x1="270" y1="360" x2="246" y2="220" />
    </g>

    <!-- Top spire -->
    <polygon points="242,70 260,20 232,20 230,70" fill="#FF6F3C" />
    <circle cx="246" cy="18" r="6" fill="#FF6F3C" />
  </g>

  <!-- Cherry blossoms (sakura) -->
  <g>
    <!-- blossom 1 -->
    <g transform="translate(120,120) scale(1.0)">
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="-8" rx="8" ry="14" fill="#FFB6C1" transform="rotate(-15)" />
      <ellipse cx="6" cy="6" rx="8" ry="12" fill="#FF91A4" transform="rotate(35)" />

      <ellipse cx="12" cy="-2" rx="8" ry="12" fill="#FF91A4" transform="rotate(80)" />
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="3" fill="#FFA0B0" />
    </g>
    <!-- blossom 2 -->
    <g transform="translate(360,80) scale(0.85)">
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="-8" rx="7" ry="12" fill="#FFB6C1" transform="rotate(-10)" />

      <ellipse cx="-6" cy="6" rx="7" ry="10" fill="#FFC0CB" transform="rotate(-30)" />

      <ellipse cx="10" cy="-2" rx="7" ry="10" fill="#FF91A4" transform="rotate(70)" />
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="2.5" fill="#FFA0B0" />

    <!-- falling petals -->
    <ellipse cx="300" cy="180" rx="6" ry="9" fill="#FFB6C1" transform="rotate(25)" opacity="0.9" />
    <ellipse cx="180" cy="240" rx="5" ry="8" fill="#FFC0CB" transform="rotate(-20)" opacity="0.9" />
    <ellipse cx="420" cy="200" rx="5" ry="8" fill="#FF91A4" transform="rotate(10)" opacity="0.9" />
  </g>

  <!-- Bullet train (Shinkansen) at bottom right -->
  <g transform="translate(280,360)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="200" height="52" rx="18" ry="18" fill="#F5F5F5" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" />
    <rect x="20" y="12" width="160" height="20" rx="6" ry="6" fill="#1F2933" opacity="0.95" />
    <circle cx="190" cy="26" r="6" fill="#90CAF9" opacity="0.9" />

</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">

      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#0f172a"/>

    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="g1" cx="30%" cy="30%" r="50%">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#ff3b81" stop-opacity="1"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#ff3b81" stop-opacity="0.6"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <radialGradient id="g2" cx="70%" cy="35%" r="50%">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#00f0ff" stop-opacity="1"/>

  <g fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.9">

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#e9f5ff"/>
  <!-- ground -->
  <rect y="420" width="512" height="92" fill="#d9d9d9"/>
  <ellipse cx="260" cy="468" rx="220" ry="18" fill="#cfcfcf" opacity="0.5"/>

  <!-- Brick wall -->
  <g id="wall">
    <!-- draw bricks: 6 columns x 6 rows -->
    <!-- brick style: width 44, height 28, horizontal gap 6, vertical gap 6 -->
    <!-- starting at (80,180) -->
    <!-- row 0 -->
    <rect x="80" y="180" width="44" height="28" fill="#d66f3f" stroke="#8b3e26" stroke-width="2"/>
    <rect x="130" y="180" width="44" height="28" fill="#d66f3f" stroke="#8b3e26" stroke-width="2"/>
    <rect x="180" y="180" width="44" height="28" fill="#d66f3f" stroke="#8b3e26" stroke-width="2"/>
    <rect x="230" y="180" width="44" height="28" fill="#d66f3f" stroke="#8b3e26" stroke-width="2"/>
    <rect x="280" y="180" width="44" height="28" fill="#d66f3f" stroke="#8b3e26" stroke-width="2"/>
    <rect x="330" y="180" width="44" height="28" fill="#d66f3f" stroke="#8b3e26" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- row 1 -->

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#f7f7f8" />

  <!-- Clock (top) -->
  <g transform="translate(0,0)">
    <circle cx="256" cy="100" r="64" fill="#fffef8" stroke="#3b3b3b" stroke-width="6" />
    <!-- ticks -->
    <line x1="256" y1="36" x2="256" y2="52" stroke="#3b3b3b" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <line x1="320" y1="100" x2="304" y2="100" stroke="#3b3b3b" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <line x1="256" y1="164" x2="256" y2="148" stroke="#3b3b3b" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <line x1="192" y1="100" x2="208" y2="100" stroke="#3b3b3b" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <!-- hands -->
    <line x1="256" y1="100" x2="296" y2="76" stroke="#2b2b2b" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <line x1="256" y1="100" x2="236" y2="124" stroke="#2b2b2b" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" />
    <circle cx="256" cy="100" r="6" fill="#2b2b2b" />
  </g>

  <!-- Hourglass (center) -->
  <g>
    <!-- frame bars -->
    <rect x="150" y="188" width="212" height="14" rx="6" fill="#8b6b3a" />
    <rect x="150" y="390" width="212" height="14" rx="6" fill="#8b6b3a" />
    <!-- vertical posts -->
    <rect x="166" y="200" width="12" height="190" rx="6" fill="#6b4e2d" />
    <rect x="334" y="200" width="12" height="190" rx="6" fill="#6b4e2d" />

    <!-- glass outline (two triangles forming hourglass) -->
    <polygon points="176,220 336,220 256,300" fill="#eaf6ff" fill-opacity="0.6" stroke="#4b8bbf" stroke-width="4" stroke-linejoin="round" />
    <polygon points="256,300 336,380 176,380" fill="#eaf6ff" fill-opacity="0.6" stroke="#4b8bbf" stroke-width="4" stroke-linejoin="round" />

    <!-- top remaining sand (small wedge) -->
    <polygon points="216,230 296,230 256,264" fill="#e2b07a" />
    <!-- falling sand grain -->
    <circle cx="256" cy="285" r="4" fill="#e2b07a" />
    <!-- bottom sand pile -->
    <path d="M216 360 C236 345, 276 345, 296 360 C276 372, 236 372, 216 360 Z" fill="#e2b07a" />

    <!-- subtle inner glass highlight -->
    <path d="M184 224 C222 260, 222 340, 184 368" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-opacity="0.35" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" />
  </g>

</svg>
